runTitle: Cloud Run Vision Provider Answer Quality Smoke
coveredSurfaces: Cloud Run direct /api/ai/supervisor vision image analysis
Gemini primary vision answer quality for dashboard screenshot
GLM fallback vision routing and answer availability with Gemini disabled
Provider toggle restore after targeted fallback smoke

completedImprovements.title: Gemini primary vision image answer quality verified for dashboard screenshot
completedImprovements.evidence: Gemini returned HTTP 200 through Vision Agent with provider=gemini, model=gemini-2.5-flash-lite, latencyMs=9375, and 8/8 scripted visual grounding checks.

pendingImprovements.title: GLM vision fallback returned HTTP 500 before answer-quality validation
pendingImprovements.note: Fallback-only path, but it must be root-caused before relying on Z.AI GLM for vision resilience when Gemini is disabled or unavailable.

notes: Manual-only vision QA: one Gemini primary call and one GLM fallback call; no repeated provider matrix.
Gemini primary: HTTP 200, success=true, finalAgent=Vision Agent, provider=gemini, model=gemini-2.5-flash-lite, responseChars=718, latencyMs=9375.
Gemini correctly read the core current-state values from the image: cache-redis-dc1-01, CPU 71%, memory 92%, disk 21%, CPU/memory high, disk normal, and actionable remediation.
Gemini trend wording should not be treated as strict numeric forecast proof: the response detected a future upward trend, but manual review noticed forecast delta attribution may not be exact.
GLM fallback: Gemini was disabled for the fallback sample, but /api/ai/supervisor returned HTTP 500 after 4416ms with no answer body to score.
Provider restore completed after the smoke: cerebras=true, groq=true, mistral=true, zai=true, gemini=true.
